mapper.insert: INSERT INTO target_prediction_job (wemol_job_id, user_name, module_id, module_name, request_payload_json, params_json, upload_file_name, upload_path, status, last_message, error_message, result_dir, result_dir_use_task_name, predicted_targets_json, details_json, result_files_json, progress, retry_count, created_at, updated_at, finished_at) VALUES (#{wemolJobId}, #{userName}, #{moduleId}, #{moduleName}, #{requestPayloadJson}, #{paramsJson}, #{uploadFileName}, #{uploadPath}, #{status}, #{lastMessage}, #{errorMessage}, #{resultDir}, #{resultDirUseTaskName}, #{predictedTargetsJson}, #{detailsJson}, #{resultFilesJson}, #{progress}, #{retryCount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{finishedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, wemol_job_id, user_name, module_id, module_name, request_payload_json, params_json, upload_file_name, upload_path, status, last_message, error_message, result_dir, result_dir_use_task_name, predicted_targets_json, details_json, result_files_json, progress, retry_count, created_at, updated_at, finished_at FROM target_prediction_job WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, wemol_job_id, user_name, module_id, module_name, request_payload_json, params_json, upload_file_name, upload_path, status, last_message, error_message, result_dir, result_dir_use_task_name, predicted_targets_json, details_json, result_files_json, progress, retry_count, created_at, updated_at, finished_at FROM target_prediction_job WHERE user_name = #{userName} ORDER BY created_at DESC
